vehicle.label: Small Launch Vehicle (sounding)

parts.label: Battery/Power Display Module

parts.spec: Recovery_bay educational display dummy with deploy_door, hinge, parachute volume label, inspection window, no deployment charge or flight recovery instruction

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness in the combustion_chamber_dummy due to material selection.
risk.mit: Conduct material stress analysis and consider alternative materials if necessary.

risk.desc: Misalignment of the bell_nozzle_shell may affect visual clarity.
risk.mit: Implement precise alignment tools during assembly.

risk.desc: Difficulty in removing the slide_rail due to tight tolerances.
risk.mit: Review and adjust tolerance settings to ensure ease of removal.

risk.desc: Inadequate strain relief for cables exiting the cutaway_window.
risk.mit: Add strain relief features to all cable exits.

risk.desc: Risk of incorrect mating due to unlabeled connectors.
risk.mit: Label all connectors and ensure keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating.
